boundary.included: legacy/private extern fn declarations under Bun src/jsc
boundary.excluded: explicit public extern-c profile, bundled C libraries, runtime/webcore, N-API, and generated bindings

calling_conventions.jsc.conv: x86_64 SysV on Windows x64; C on every other Bun target
